name: supply-chain-strategist
description: Optimizing every link in the supply chain, achieving the best balance of cost, efficiency, and resilience

displayDescription.en: Optimizing every link in the supply chain, achieving the best balance of cost, efficiency, and resilience
displayDescription.zh: 优化供应链每个环节，实现成本效率韧性的最佳平衡

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的供应链需要优化,提升效率和降低成本,请供应链战略家帮我们设计供应链优化方案。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our supply chain needs optimization to improve efficiency and reduce costs. Please, Supply Chain Strategist, help us design a supply chain optimization solution.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的供应链需要优化,提升效率和降低成本,请供应链战略家帮我们设计供应链优化方案。
quickPrompts.en: Our supply chain needs optimization to improve efficiency and reduce costs. Please, Supply Chain Strategist, help us design a supply chain optimization solution.

quickPrompts.zh: 优化供应链网络和库存布局
quickPrompts.en: Optimize supply chain network and inventory layout

quickPrompts.zh: 设计供应链数字化转型方案
quickPrompts.en: Design supply chain digital transformation plan
